overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an urban park plaza beneath an elevated highway. The player moves from a wooden bridge across a canal, through a paved pedestrian area with food vendors, and into a wooded encampment area with makeshift shelters and debris.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across wooden bridge toward plaza area ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the plaza

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with metal railings crossing over water
black metal safety railings along both sides of the bridge
calm waterway running parallel to the walkway below the bridge
tall green bamboo grove surrounding the bridge approach
open concrete area with large rock formations visible at the end of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wooden pedestrian bridge crossing a canal, surrounded by dense bamboo groves. The camera moves forward toward a concrete plaza visible in the distance, with metal railings lining both sides of the walkway. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto concrete plaza under massive highway overpass pillars
turns left onto boardwalk running alongside the canal

agents.ego_description: turns left and continues walking along the boardwalk next to the water

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway above
elevated wooden walkway running parallel to the canal
large colorful digital advertisements on distant buildings
tall modern glass and concrete structures in the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive concrete highway pillars. The camera turns left onto a wooden boardwalk running alongside the canal, with neon billboards and modern buildings visible in the background. The waterway shifts from the right to the left side of the frame.

events.description: passes blue food cart with red white and blue umbrella on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and pedestrians along the boardwalk

notable_agents.action: jogger in bright green pants runs past the camera
vendor standing at blue food cart serving customers

entered.detail: small blue mobile food cart with colorful umbrella
small street vendor setup with display items
modern street lamp emitting cyan blue light

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the boardwalk, the camera passes a jogger and approaches a blue food cart with a colorful umbrella where a vendor stands. The area has moderate pedestrian traffic with street lamps and the highway overpass still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded encampment area with makeshift shelters

events.description: transitions from paved boardwalk to dirt path through dense trees
passes green tarp shelter and cardboard box encampment on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through wooded area observing homeless encampments and makeshift shelters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the encampment area ahead

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel trail through the wooded area
makeshift homeless shelter constructed from green tarp and poles
concrete seating structures along the path
stacked cardboard boxes and salvaged materials

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from wooden planks to dirt as the camera enters a densely wooded area. The path winds through trees past homeless encampments with green tarp shelters, cardboard boxes, and concrete benches. The highway structure fades from view as the canopy thickens overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense homeless encampment with abandoned furniture and debris

events.description: navigates through cluttered area with abandoned couches and scattered trash

agents.ego_description: moving through dense encampment with discarded furniture and makeshift structures

entered.detail: discarded green sofa left on the side of the path
salvaged wooden shelving units and crates
large green metal dumpster with yellow lid
rectangular concrete planter box with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the encampment where the dirt path becomes cluttered with abandoned furniture including couches, wooden shelves, and scattered debris. A green dumpster and concrete planters appear as the camera navigates through the narrow, cluttered pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, bamboo-lined walkway into a cluttered urban encampment beneath a highway. It begins on a wooden pedestrian bridge crossing a canal, moving forward past metal railings toward a distant concrete plaza. As the camera exits the bridge, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive highway pillars before shifting left onto a wooden boardwalk where neon billboards glow in the background and a blue food cart with a colorful umbrella appears. The ground then transitions from wooden planks to dirt as the camera enters a densely wooded area, winding past green tarp shelters and cardboard boxes while the highway structure fades behind a thickening canopy. Finally, the path narrows and becomes heavily cluttered with abandoned couches, wooden shelves, and a green dumpster as the camera pushes deeper into the debris of the encampment.
